posts.author: PaulUppal (Paul Uppal)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

Would like to see different data sets from email sequences directly rather than from Contacts. Data like best performing email, most engaging contacts and how many time contact has opened/ clicked an email would be great to know. Through this data we can get more insights that will lead to better results.

What are you trying to achieve

Get more data so that we can re target most engaging contacts again and not to people who are not engaging at all.
